headline: Fox Corporation (FOXA) in Advance Talks With Kalshi
summary: Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOXA) is one of the 11 Best Stocks You’ll Wish You Bought Sooner. On March 18, 2026, Front Office Sports reported that Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOXA) and Kalshi have entered advanced negotiations for a strategic partnership centered on Fox News and Fox Weather. headline: NFL approves sale of 3.5% of Las Vegas Raiders at over $11 billion valuation
summary: The National Football League has approved the sale of 7% of the Las Vegas Raiders at a valuation of more than $11 billion.
